context_records.content: The objective is to stop remediation classification loops earlier by giving the remediation planner explicit visibility into prior attempt outcomes pulled from the existing SQLite history. The likely implementation path is to locate where prior outcomes are already persisted, thread that history into the remediation planning inputs, format it so the planner can distinguish repeated failed classifications from alternative paths, and verify the prompt now reliably contains this context without breaking existing retry-cap behavior.

context_records.content: This objective proposes adding a lightweight pre-execution simulation stage that uses historical `prior_outcomes` data to estimate step-level failure risk before the harness commits to a task tree. The likely implementation centers on integrating this prediction into `RoutingHook`, selectively rerouting or flagging risky paths, and falling back cleanly when confidence is low. The main red-team concern is whether the team has defined the simulation granularity, decision policy, and measurement method tightly enough to improve outcomes without adding latency, false alarms, or brittle dependence on incomplete historical data.

objectives.summary: The retry cap correctly blocks loops when the same root cause classification is repeated, but the remediation planner prompt lacks the prior outcomes context needed to proactively choose a different strategy.
objectives.title: Inject prior_outcomes history into remediation planner to break classification loops

objectives.summary: To improve task completion rates, this objective introduces a pre-execution 'simulation' step. Before committing to a task tree, the harness will perform a dry run, using the existing 'prior_outcomes' database to predict the success probability of each step. This allows the harness to identify and reroute around likely failure points, preventing wasted execution and improving the success rate of complex tasks.
objectives.title: Proactive Task Validation via Outcome-Driven Simulation

objectives.summary: Implement more detailed logging and attribution for task outcomes, including specific reasons for failures and retries, to improve diagnosability and drive completion rate towards 96%+.
objectives.title: Enhance task outcome logging and failure reason attribution

projects.description: Ongoing architectural improvements to increase objective completion rate

tasks.objective:
In `src/accruvia_harness/services/task_service.py`, add a public `TaskService.build_retry_history_for_task(task_id: str)` helper that resolves the retry-tree root, loads descendant tasks, and returns the existing SQLite-backed history payload currently assembled by `_build_retry_history`. The helper must preserve root-first ordering and include the same `task_id`, `run_id`, `outcome`, `verdict`, `decision`, and `failure` fields already used for remediation metadata. Acceptance is that any caller can retrieve prior remediation outcomes for a task without rebuilding the retry-tree traversal logic elsewhere.

Files involved: src/accruvia_harness/services/task_service.py
tasks.title: Publish TaskService.build_retry_history_for_task

tasks.objective:
In `src/accruvia_harness/policy.py`, add a `prior_outcomes` field to `RetryContext` and update `DefaultPlanner.plan` to render an explicit `Prior outcomes history` section whenever that list is present. The planner output must still keep the existing focus/previous verdict behavior, but the returned `PlanResult.summary` and `PlanResult.retry_context` must now carry the ordered historical outcomes so the remediation planner prompt can see more than the last failure. Acceptance is that a retry plan for a remediation task contains the new heading plus multiple prior attempts with their outcome and failure classification details.

Files involved: src/accruvia_harness/policy.py
tasks.title: Extend RetryContext and DefaultPlanner.plan with prior_outcomes

tasks.objective:
In `src/accruvia_harness/services/run_service.py`, update `RunService._work_phase` so the retry advisor receives the full prior outcomes list from `TaskService.build_retry_history_for_task` before calling `planner.plan`. The handoff must use the existing SQLite store, not ad hoc in-memory state, and it must preserve the current previous-run lookup used for focus selection. Acceptance is that retry planning for a remediation task includes prior outcomes from the persisted history even when they come from earlier remediation descendants rather than only the immediately previous run.

Files involved: src/accruvia_harness/services/run_service.py
tasks.title: Pass retry history through RunService._work_phase

tasks.objective:
In `src/accruvia_harness/workers.py` and `src/accruvia_harness/agent_worker.py`, update the prompt builders so multi-line retry plan summaries are emitted as an explicit block instead of being flattened into a single `Plan Summary:` line. The prompt text written to `codex_worker_prompt.txt` and the routed LLM prompt must visibly include the `Prior outcomes history` section produced by the planner. Acceptance is that the final remediation prompt artifact contains the history heading and prior-attempt lines verbatim when the planner supplies them.

Files involved: src/accruvia_harness/workers.py, src/accruvia_harness/agent_worker.py
tasks.title: Render prior outcomes block in RoutedLLMWorker and agent_worker prompts

tasks.objective:
In `tests/test_engine.py` and `tests/test_strategy_agent.py`, add focused regressions that prove persisted retry history flows from SQLite into remediation planning and appears in the generated retry prompt. One test should verify the public retry-history helper returns ordered root/remediation outcomes, and another should verify a remediation retry plan or prompt contains `Prior outcomes history` with multiple historical entries so the agent can avoid repeating the same classification. Acceptance is that both tests fail on the current single-attempt behavior and pass only after the new history injection path is wired end to end.

Files involved: tests/test_engine.py, tests/test_strategy_agent.py
tasks.title: Add remediation-history prompt regression coverage
